dimensions.name: Delivery

improvements: No fixes needed — previous run also had no issues. Team continues to respond cleanly.
issues: None. All agents responded promptly, on-topic, correct format. Project-level blockers noted (Narvi waiting on server routes, Elanor needs frontend repo path) but these are not teamwork issues.
